title: NovoJuris Legal acts on Elmed Life Sciences Series A fundraise
description: Elmed Life Sciences Private Limited has raised $2.7 million from a Series A fundraise from AgriSURE Fund, managed by NABVENTURES.NovoJuris Legal advised AgriSURE Fund on this fundraise. The Firm managed regulatory requirements, conducted legal due diligence, drafted and negotiated transaction documents which required alignment to the strategic goals. The firm also facilitated multiple stakeholder discussions to provide a highly efficient closure of the transaction.The transaction team consisted
